login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Complete the information to create your account and business
register.cardDescription: Complete the information to create your account and business

phone.label: Contact phone
phone.helper: Enter 10 digits only, country code is pre-filled

wizard.step2Description: Select the plan that best fits your business
wizard.step3Description: Your account was created. Make a payment to activate it
wizard.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please start the registration again.
wizard.sessionExpiredWarning: Your registration session expired. Please start over.
wizard.registrationError: Could not complete registration. Please verify your data and try again.

payment.title: Account created successfully!
payment.subtitle: Make a payment to activate your business
payment.alertBody: Your account is created but not yet active. Make the payment to start using ToGo.
payment.referenceHint: Include this reference in your transfer so we can identify your payment.
payment.nextStep1: Make the transfer with the indicated reference
payment.nextStep2: We will contact you to confirm the payment
payment.nextStep3: We will activate your account and you can start using ToGo

forgotPassword.title: Recover password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll help you restore your access
forgotPassword.cardDescription: Don't worry, we'll send you instructions to recover it
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

success.title: Check your email!
success.message: We've sent instructions to reset your password to {email}

logout.title: Sign out
logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

errors.emailNotFound: We couldn't find an account with that email
errors.emailExists: An account already exists with this email
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
